deploy.startCommand: sed -i "s|^APP_ENV=.*|APP_ENV=$APP_ENV|;s|^APP_DEBUG=.*|APP_DEBUG=$APP_DEBUG|;s|^APP_URL=.*|APP_URL=$APP_URL|;s|^DB_HOST=.*|DB_HOST=$DB_HOST|;s|^DB_PORT=.*|DB_PORT=$DB_PORT|;s|^DB_DATABASE=.*|DB_DATABASE=$DB_DATABASE|;s|^DB_USERNAME=.*|DB_USERNAME=$DB_USERNAME|;s|^DB_PASSWORD=.*|DB_PASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD|" .env && php artisan config:clear && php artisan migrate:fresh --seed --force && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
